name: concurrency-100
description: Scenario A / I2 stream-integrity check workload (inference-lab IL-T002; NOT part of the canonical benchmark suite — never cite for performance numbers). Sustains >=100 concurrent in-flight streams against the composed gateway+mock stack: mock ttft=300ms itl=30ms, mock output length seeded-uniform 1..min(max_tokens,256) (mean ~128 tokens => mean stream ~4.2s), 30 rps x ~4.2s => ~127 expected concurrent streams at steady state. Verification: every event ok, server-reported usage tokens == client-received content chunks, zero frame mixing.
